content.text: I had a conversation with Mr. Beast a
few weeks ago and we were talking about
kind of like the future of media and
content. One of the things that he was
talking about was the soccer game that
came up that they do like UK versus US.
What ends up happening is that they have
all these different celebrities or
influencers from different platforms.
They would walk out in the stadium and
this became the de facto like measuring
stick for who had the most cool points,
right? Shorts have slight applause like
only Tik Tockers or people who only make
reals but like only short videos. Longs
have legit applause. So this is your
podcasters, your YouTubers, the people
who make long form pieces of content.
Then the live streamers. When the live
streamers came out, it was like the
entire auditorium or stadium or arena
erupted. I'm going to be doing more live
streams. I'm going all in on this. So if
you guys are like, "What's Alex's kind
of like media strategy for the future?"
Live interactive.
